concerns: Step 2: Prefer avoiding `overflow-x: hidden` on viewport as a blanket rule — it masks real layout bugs. Fix overflow sources directly instead.
Step 3: Sticky/fixed header on mobile may consume too much vertical space for a card-reading app. Consider standard flow on all viewports unless user testing suggests otherwise.
Steps 9-10: Playwright tests require `npm run build` before `npm run test:e2e` (preview serves from dist/). Ensure build step is included or the plan may fail at the E2E gate.
